description:
The libreport-plugin-rhtsupport package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove libreport-plugin-rhtsupport
rationale:
<tt>libreport-plugin-rhtsupport</tt> is a ABRT plugin to report bugs into the
Red Hat Support system.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the libreport-plugin-rhtsupport package is installed: 
$ rpm -q libreport-plugin-rhtsupport
title: Uninstall libreport-plugin-rhtsupport Package
